name: Magic Stick
description: A simple wand used to channel magic energies, it is favored by apprentice wizards and great warlocks alike.

abilities.name: Energy Charge
abilities.description: Uses up all charges to instantly heal and replenish the caster's health and mana based on the number of charges. Number of Charges: 10. Cooldown: 17. Mana Cost: 0. Heal per Charge: 15. Mana Restore per Charge: 15. Radius: 1200.
